revision.comment: Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata
revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]][[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[ja:Category:21世紀の歌人]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Ken'ichi Tanigawa]].

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Immanuelle moved page [[Category:21世紀の歌人]] to [[Category:21st century poets]]: Merge [[Category:21世紀の歌人]] into [[Category:21st century poets]] via bot
Immanuelle moved page [[Category:21世紀の歌人]] to [[Category:21st century poets]]: Merge [[Category:21世紀の歌人]] into [[Category:21st century poets]] via bot
revision.text: #REDIRECT [[:Category:21st century poets]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[Category:21世紀の歌人]] to [[Category:21st century poets]]: Merge [[Category:21世紀の歌人]] into [[Category:21st century poets]] via bot
revision.text: #REDIRECT [[:Category:21st century poets]]

revision.comment: Bot: concatenate old target wikitext
Text replacement - "#REDIRECT [[:Category" to "[[sn:Category"
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q61007268)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{各世紀日本の歌人}}
{{CategoryTOC}}
{{デフォルトソート:かしん}}
{{citation needed|かしん}}
{{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:21世紀の歌人}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:21世紀の歌人|version=98437270}}
{{wikidata link|Q61007268}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[ja:Category:21世紀の歌人]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:sn_crud|TESTCategory:21st century poets]]
[[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Ken'ichi Tanigawa]]
[[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]
[[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]]
[[Category:questionable possibly untranslated categories]]
[[Category:Tier 3 Categories]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=21st_century_poets here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
